title: Don't provide an initializer for a stateless stream gatherer
description: Stateless stream gatherers should not be provided with an initializer, as this can introduce unnecessary complexity and potential errors. Ensuring gatherers remain stateless improves code clarity and maintainability.
recommendation: Remove any initializer from stateless stream gatherers to keep them simple and reliable.

noncompliant: Gatherer<String, ?, List<String>> gatherer = Gatherer.of(() -> new ArrayList<>(), ...); // Noncompliant: initializer provided for stateless gatherer.
compliant: Gatherer<String, ?, List<String>> gatherer = Gatherer.of(...); // Compliant: no initializer for stateless gatherer.

checks.message: Don't provide an initializer for stateless stream gatherer
